items.title: ‘Tell Him He’s a Piece of Shit’: Meta’s New AI Unit Is a Total Mess
items.summary: Executives and employees alike are struggling with Meta's chaotic AI strategy, according to sources and internal discussions reviewed by WIRED.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
items.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Nothing CEO says phone prices are going to keep going up
items.summary: If you're thinking about upgrading your phone, "the best time was yesterday," according to Nothing CEO and co-founder Carl Pei, echoing a message we heard during MWC. As Android...
